samples.target_compile_errors:
error[E0600]: cannot apply unary operator `-` to type `u8`
 --> benchmark_results/2026-05-06T18-03-03/llama-3.1-70b/conversions/bool_char_int_c3/sample_001/target.rs:2:20
  |
2 |     let pc: char = -1 as char;
  |                    ^^ cannot apply unary operator `-`
  |
  = note: unsigned values cannot be negated
help: you may have meant the maximum value of `u8`
  |
2 -     let pc: char = -1 as char;
2 +     let pc: char = u8::MAX;
  |

error[E0369]: cannot add `{integer}` to `char`
  --> benchmark_results/2026-05-06T18-03-03/llama-3.1-70b/conversions/bool_char_int_c3/sample_001/target.rs:10:35
   |
10 |     if std::mem::size_of_val(&(pc + 0))!= std::mem::size_of::<i32>() {
   |                                -- ^ - {integer}
   |                                |
   |                                char

error[E0308]: mismatched types
  --> benchmark_results/2026-05-06T18-03-03/llama-3.1-70b/conversions/bool_char_int_c3/sample_001/target.rs:24:13
   |
24 |     if pc < 0 {
   |        --   ^ expected `char`, found `u8`
   |        |
   |        expected because this is `char`
